meta.note: Tokemak v1 EthPool (tWETH reactor). 2-step withdraw: requestWithdrawal(amount) then withdraw(amount, false) after manager rolls cycles (~weekly). Holders with `ready: true` have a pending request that has matured and can call step 2 immediately. Manager: 0xa86e412109f77c45a3bc1c5870b880492fb86a14.
